steps.description: Click the "Custom Engine Agent" option in the "New Project" dropdown to select it.
Click the "Weather Agent" dropdown option in the "App Features Using Microsoft 365 Agents SDK" dialog in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "TypeScript" option in the dropdown list under the "Programming Language" selection menu in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Default folder" path input field in the "Workspace Folder" selection dialog of the Visual Studio Code interface, located at coordinates (304, 76).
